summary: Phase 7 LAUNCH (run v2). Deployed dist/ to Netlify production via authenticated CLI (site captains-fish-chicken, deploy 6a4ed26f521f950a4b65d24b) — https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app is LIVE with the ship-clean v2 build (38 routes, real identity, validate exit 0). All nine required launch checks executed against the LIVE URL and passing: identity (title + self-canonical on the real domain), validation (factory validate exit 0, sealed Phase 5), imagery (live assets 200: open-late.webp, beach-loop.mp4, menu renders), conversion-actions (3 tel: links live on home), crawlability (robots.txt 200 with AI-crawler allow-list; sitemap-index 200), analytics (gtag G-7W35DKNK6Z loads once), local-presence (NAP + business email in live llms.txt), broken-links (38/38 live routes return 200), mobile-lighthouse (real Lighthouse on live URL: performance 90, FCP 2.2s, LCP 2.6s, CLS 0, TBT 250ms). Post-launch verification passed. Owner follow-ups recorded: GSC property + sitemap submission, GBP website-field update, live-GBP 4.4-rating re-check, hours confirmation to extend structured hours, logo file drop, stale SW listing cleanup.

all 9 required checks executed against the live URL; see launchChecklist

factory validate exit 0 (zero gates, zero advisories) — sealed Phase 5 evidence at phase-5/factory-validate.log; independently re-confirmed by the Phase 5 reviewer

LIVE: 3 tel:+13192211040 anchors on home (header CTA, CTA banner, visit block) + sticky mobile call bar; gtag tel-click event handler present (contact events fire to G-7W35DKNK6Z)
LIVE: /robots.txt 200 (allow-list includes GPTBot/ClaudeBot/PerplexityBot/Google-Extended, references sitemap); /sitemap-index.xml 200 covering exactly the 38 routes on the real domain
LIVE: googletagmanager gtag/js?id=G-7W35DKNK6Z loads exactly once on home + config call present (Google-recommended snippet, engine-rendered on all 38 pages)

LIVE: /llms.txt carries NAP (1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids IA 52402, +1-319-221-1040), business email, cuisine, price range, and the full priced menu; Restaurant JSON-LD with servesCuisine/priceRange/hasMenu site-wide; /location truth page live
LIVE sweep: all 38 approved routes fetched over HTTPS — 38/38 return 200, zero non-200; build-time sweeps showed zero dangling internal links
Real Lighthouse (npx lighthouse, mobile form factor, headless Chrome) against the LIVE production URL: performance 90/100, FCP 2.2s, LCP 2.6s, CLS 0, TBT 250ms
